## Summary

-

## Checks

- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`, and `npm run lint`, or documented why not.
- [ ] I checked keyboard access and visible focus for interactive changes.
- [ ] I checked reduced-motion behavior for animation changes.
- [ ] I kept status and meaning understandable without relying only on color or motion.
- [ ] I updated docs, labels, alt text, or examples if user-facing behavior changed.
